MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Plaintiff MAN WAS S. AMENNUNO in propria persona opposing party

Deputy Clerk CARMEN K. LI served as interpreter in translating the English language into the Cantonese language and vice versa. The matter was argued by Plaintiff and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- demurrer sustained. (DAB) Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193
